description_long: This house features a sleek, modernist design with clean lines and a flat roof, characterized by a minimalist white facade and expansive glass panels. The structure is composed of two main rectangular volumes, one larger and one smaller, connected by a central open area that appears to include a swimming pool. The larger volume likely contains the main living spaces, while the smaller volume could serve as a garage or guest suite. The property is set on a raised platform, with the pool integrated into the layout and bordered by a spacious patio. Large windows and sliding glass doors are visible, maximizing natural light and providing seamless indoor-outdoor flow. The overall aesthetic is contemporary, with an emphasis on open space, geometric forms, and functional outdoor amenities.
description: A modern, flat-roofed house with a minimalist white facade, large glass windows, and an integrated swimming pool on a raised platform. The design features clean lines, open spaces, and a strong indoor-outdoor connection.
description_view_0: From this side, the house's long, linear profile is visible, highlighting the main living volume, the pool, and the smaller secondary structure.
description_view_1: This view emphasizes the depth of the pool and the separation between the two main building volumes, with the patio area clearly visible.
description_view_2: The rear side shows the full length of the house, the pool, and the connection between the main and secondary structures.
description_view_3: From this angle, the pool is prominent in the foreground, with the entry area and the smaller building volume to the left.
attribute_entryway_design: Minimalist main entry with a flat overhang, wide glass doors, and a seamless transition to the patio; no visible steps or decorative columns.
